title: Neorautanenia brachypus
taxonomy: Neorautanenia brachypus is classified within the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae. The species Neorautanenia brachypus is further classified into two varieties, Neorautanenia brachypus var. brachypus and Neorautanenia brachypus var. pilosa. Neorautanenia brachypus is a member of the genus Neorautanenia. The classification of Neorautanenia brachypus is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics.
uses: Neorautanenia brachypus, also known as the white pumpkin or white melon, has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of Africa. It is valued for its purported anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
